<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Exceptions; use Exception; class InvalidBackupDestination extends Exception { public static function diskNotSet(string $backupName): self { return new static("There is no disk set for the backup named `{$backupName}`."); } public static function connectionError(string $diskName): self { return new static ("There is a connection error when trying to connect to disk named `{$diskName}`"); } public static function writeError(string $diskName): self { return new static ("There was an error trying to write to disk named `{$diskName}`"); } }
